name: @wholiver_hu/metis
description: A terminal-first coding agent that helps models search, remember, execute, and verify more reliably

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && tsgo -p packages/phronesis-governance/tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.build:binary: npm --prefix ../tui run build && npm --prefix ../ai run build && npm --prefix ../agent run build && npm run build && bun build --compile ./dist/bun/cli.js ./src/utils/image-resize-worker.ts --outfile dist/metis && npm run copy-binary-assets
scripts.copy-binary-assets: shx cp package.json dist/ && shx cp README.md dist/ && shx cp CHANGELOG.md dist/ && shx mkdir -p dist/theme && shx cp src/modes/interactive/theme/*.json dist/theme/ && shx mkdir -p dist/assets && shx cp src/modes/interactive/assets/*.png dist/assets/ && shx mkdir -p dist/export-html/vendor && shx cp src/core/export-html/template.html dist/export-html/ && shx cp src/core/export-html/vendor/*.js dist/export-html/vendor/ && shx cp -r docs dist/ && shx cp -r examples dist/ && shx cp ../../node_modules/@silvia-odwyer/photon-node/photon_rs_bg.wasm dist/

author: Wholiver
